 `./worktrees/298-tap-forgiveness/src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.ts`

```text
1	import {
2	  draggable,
3	  dropTargetForElements,
4	} from '@atlaskit/pragmatic-drag-and-drop/element/adapter';
5	import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
6	import { flashBankTileRejectFeedback } from './bank-tile-reject-feedback';
7	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
8	import { useAnswerGameDispatch } from './useAnswerGameDispatch';
9	import { useAutoNextSlot } from './useAutoNextSlot';
10	import { useGameTTS } from './useGameTTS';
11	import { useTileEvaluation } from './useTileEvaluation';
12	import { useTouchDrag } from './useTouchDrag';
13	import type { TileItem } from './types';
14	import type { TouchDragHandlers } from './useTouchDrag';
15	import type { RefObject } from 'react';
16	import { useSettings } from '@/db/hooks/useSettings';
17	import { playSound } from '@/lib/audio/AudioFeedback';
18	import { getGameEventBus } from '@/lib/game-event-bus';
19	import { resolveSkin } from '@/lib/skin';
20	
21	export interface DraggableTile extends TouchDragHandlers {
22	  ref: RefObject<HTMLButtonElement | null>;
23	  handleClick: () => void;
24	}
25	
26	export const useDraggableTile = (tile: TileItem): DraggableTile => {
27	  const ref = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null);
28	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
29	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
30	  // Mirror state in a ref so onDragStart can read current gameId/roundIndex
31	  // without adding `state` to the draggable() effect's deps (which would
32	  // re-subscribe pragmatic-drag-and-drop on every game-state change).
33	  const stateRef = useRef(state);
34	  const { placeInNextSlot } = useAutoNextSlot();
35	  const { speakTile } = useGameTTS();
36	  const speakTileRef = useRef(speakTile);
37	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
38	  const { settings } = useSettings();
39	  const skin = resolveSkin(state.config.gameId, state.config.skin);
40	
41	  useEffect(() => {
42	    speakTileRef.current = speakTile;
43	  }, [speakTile]);
44	
45	  useEffect(() => {
46	    stateRef.current = state;
47	  }, [state]);
48	
49	  // HTML5 DnD — desktop
50	  // SET_DRAG_ACTIVE on start so slots can show a preview while the bank tile
51	  // is being dragged. Cleared on drop (slot handler also clears it on success,
52	  // so the double-clear here is idempotent).
53	  // Also registered as a drop target so slot tiles can be dropped onto this
54	  // bank tile to trigger SWAP_SLOT_BANK. onDragEnter sets the hover preview;
55	  // hover is cleared by SET_DRAG_ACTIVE(null) when the drag ends.
56	  useEffect(() => {
57	    const element = ref.current;
58	    if (!element) return;
59	    const cleanupDraggable = draggable({
60	      element,
61	      getInitialData: () => ({ tileId: tile.id }),
62	      onDragStart: () => {
63	        speakTileRef.current(tile.label);
64	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: tile.id });
65	        getGameEventBus().emit({
66	          type: 'game:drag-start',
67	          gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
68	          sessionId: '',
69	          profileId: '',
70	          timestamp: Date.now(),
71	          roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
72	          tileId: tile.id,
73	        });
74	      },
75	      onDrop: () => dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
76	    });
77	    const cleanupDropTarget = dropTargetForElements({
78	      element,
79	      getData: () => ({ bankTileId: tile.id, isBankTarget: true }),
80	      onDragEnter: () =>
81	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER_BANK', tileId: tile.id }),
82	      onDragLeave: () =>
83	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER_BANK', tileId: null }),
84	    });
85	    return () => {
86	      cleanupDraggable();
87	      cleanupDropTarget();
88	    };
89	  }, [tile.id, tile.label, dispatch]);
90	
91	  // Pointer-events drag — touch / mobile
92	  const { onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp, onPointerCancel } =
93	    useTouchDrag({
94	      tileId: tile.id,
95	      label: tile.label,
96	      onDragStart: () => {
97	        speakTileRef.current(tile.label);
98	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: tile.id });
99	        getGameEventBus().emit({
100	          type: 'game:drag-start',
101	          gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
102	          sessionId: '',
103	          profileId: '',
104	          timestamp: Date.now(),
105	          roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
106	          tileId: tile.id,
107	        });
108	      },
109	      onDragCancel: () =>
110	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
111	      onDrop: (droppedTileId, zoneIndex) => {
112	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null });
113	        const { correct } = placeTile(droppedTileId, zoneIndex);
114	        if (
115	          !correct &&
116	          stateRef.current.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'reject'
117	        ) {
118	          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
119	            flashBankTileRejectFeedback(droppedTileId, {
120	              element: ref.current,
121	            });
122	          });
123	        }
124	      },
125	      onDropOnBank: () =>
126	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
127	      onDropOnBankTile: () =>
128	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
129	      onHoverZone: (zoneIndex) => {
130	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER', zoneIndex });
131	        if (zoneIndex !== null) {
132	          getGameEventBus().emit({
133	            type: 'game:drag-over-zone',
134	            gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
135	            sessionId: '',
136	            profileId: '',
137	            timestamp: Date.now(),
138	            roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
139	            zoneIndex,
140	          });
141	        }
142	      },
143	      tapForgivenessThreshold: settings.tapForgivenessThreshold,
144	      onTapFallback: () => {
145	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null });
146	        placeInNextSlot(tile.id);
147	      },
148	    });
149	
150	  const handleClick = () => {
151	    if (ref.current?.dataset.shaking) return;
152	
153	    speakTile(tile.label);
154	    const result = placeInNextSlot(tile.id);
155	
156	    const bankEl = ref.current;
157	    if (result.rejected && bankEl) {
158	      bankEl.dataset.shaking = 'true';
159	      flashBankTileRejectFeedback(tile.id, {
160	        element: bankEl,
161	        onAnimationEnd: () => {
162	          delete bankEl.dataset.shaking;
163	        },
164	      });
165	
166	      if (!skin.suppressDefaultSounds) {
167	        playSound('wrong', 0.8);
168	      }
169	
170	      // Tap/click path only — drag rejects are handled in useTileEvaluation.placeTile
171	      dispatch({
172	        type: 'REJECT_TAP',
173	        tileId: tile.id,
174	        zoneIndex: result.zoneIndex,
175	      });
176	
177	      getGameEventBus().emit({
178	        type: 'game:evaluate',
179	        gameId: state.config.gameId,
180	        sessionId: '',
181	        profileId: '',
182	        timestamp: Date.now(),
183	        roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
184	        answer: tile.id,
185	        correct: false,
186	        nearMiss: false,
187	        zoneIndex: result.zoneIndex,
188	        expected: state.zones[result.zoneIndex]?.expectedValue ?? '',
189	      });
190	    }
191	  };
192	
193	  return {
194	    ref,
195	    handleClick,
196	    onPointerDown,
197	    onPointerMove,
198	    onPointerUp,
199	    onPointerCancel,
200	  };
201	};
202
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
View diff for useDraggableTile.ts against master

`git diff origin/master -- src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.ts 2>/dev/null | head -100`

```text

1	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
2	import type { PointerEvent } from 'react';
3	
4	const DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX = 8;
5	
6	interface GhostInfo {
7	  el: HTMLDivElement;
8	  halfW: number;
9	  halfH: number;
10	}
11	
12	const buildGhost = (
13	  sourceEl: HTMLElement,
14	  label: string,
15	  x: number,
16	  y: number,
17	): GhostInfo => {
18	  const rect = sourceEl.getBoundingClientRect();
19	  const halfW = rect.width / 2;
20	  const halfH = rect.height / 2;
21	  const el = document.createElement('div');
22	  el.textContent = label;
23	  el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
24	  Object.assign(el.style, {
25	    position: 'fixed',
26	    left: `${x - halfW}px`,
27	    top: `${y - halfH}px`,
28	    width: `${rect.width}px`,
29	    height: `${rect.height}px`,
30	    display: 'flex',
31	    alignItems: 'center',
32	    justifyContent: 'center',
33	    borderRadius: '12px',
34	    background: 'var(--card, #fff)',
35	    color: 'var(--card-foreground, #000)',
36	    fontSize: getComputedStyle(sourceEl).fontSize,
37	    fontWeight: 'bold',
38	    boxShadow: '0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',
39	    pointerEvents: 'none',
40	    zIndex: '9999',
41	    opacity: '0.95',
42	    userSelect: 'none',
43	    transform: 'scale(1.08)',
44	  });
45	  document.body.append(el);
46	  return { el, halfW, halfH };
47	};
48	
49	export interface TouchDragHandlers {
50	  onPointerDown: (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => void;
51	  onPointerMove: (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => void;
52	  onPointerUp: (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => void;
53	  onPointerCancel: (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => void;
54	}
55	
56	interface UseTouchDragOptions {
57	  /** Empty string disables the drag (no pointer capture, no ghost). */
58	  tileId: string;
59	  label: string;
60	  onDragStart?: () => void;
61	  /** Called when the drag is cancelled or the pointer is released with no valid drop zone. */
62	  onDragCancel?: () => void;
63	  onDrop: (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number) => void;
64	  /** Called when the tile is dropped on the bank container (empty hole). */
65	  onDropOnBank?: () => void;
66	  /** Called when the tile is dropped on a specific bank tile hole. */
67	  onDropOnBankTile?: (bankTileId: string) => void;
68	  onHoverZone?: (zoneIndex: number | null) => void;
69	  /** Called when the ghost enters or leaves a bank tile hole during drag. */
70	  onHoverBankTile?: (bankTileId: string | null) => void;
71	  /** If set, micro-drags below this px distance are treated as taps. */
72	  tapForgivenessThreshold?: number;
73	  /** Called instead of cancel when displacement < tapForgivenessThreshold. */
74	  onTapFallback?: () => void;
75	}
76	
77	export const useTouchDrag = ({
78	  tileId,
79	  label,
80	  onDragStart,
81	  onDragCancel,
82	  onDrop,
83	  onDropOnBank,
84	  onDropOnBankTile,
85	  onHoverZone,
86	  onHoverBankTile,
87	  tapForgivenessThreshold,
88	  onTapFallback,
89	}: UseTouchDragOptions): TouchDragHandlers => {
90	  const onDragCancelRef = useRef(onDragCancel);
91	  useEffect(() => {
92	    onDragCancelRef.current = onDragCancel;
93	  }, [onDragCancel]);
94	
95	  const onTapFallbackRef = useRef(onTapFallback);
96	  useEffect(() => {
97	    onTapFallbackRef.current = onTapFallback;
98	  }, [onTapFallback]);
99	
100	  const onHoverZoneRef = useRef(onHoverZone);
101	  useEffect(() => {
102	    onHoverZoneRef.current = onHoverZone;
103	  }, [onHoverZone]);
104	
105	  const onHoverBankTileRef = useRef(onHoverBankTile);
106	  useEffect(() => {
107	    onHoverBankTileRef.current = onHoverBankTile;
108	  }, [onHoverBankTile]);
109	
110	  const ghostRef = useRef<GhostInfo | null>(null);
111	  const isDragging = useRef(false);
112	  const startPos = useRef<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
113	  const capturedElRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null);
114	  const capturedPointerIdRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
115	  const safetyTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<
116	    typeof globalThis.setTimeout
117	  > | null>(null);
118	
119	  // Guards against cleanupGhost → releasePointerCapture → lostpointercapture
120	  // → cleanupGhost re-entry.
121	  const cleanupInProgressRef = useRef(false);
122	  const lastHoverZoneRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
123	  const lastHoverBankTileRef = useRef<string | null>(null);
124	
125	  const cleanupGhost = useCallback(() => {
126	    if (cleanupInProgressRef.current) return;
127	    cleanupInProgressRef.current = true;
128	
129	    if (safetyTimerRef.current !== null) {
130	      globalThis.clearTimeout(safetyTimerRef.current);
131	      safetyTimerRef.current = null;
132	    }
133	
134	    ghostRef.current?.el.remove();
135	    ghostRef.current = null;
136	
137	    // Clear refs BEFORE releasePointerCapture so that any synchronous
138	    // lostpointercapture event triggered by it sees null refs and bails out.
139	    const el = capturedElRef.current;
140	    const pointerId = capturedPointerIdRef.current;
141	    capturedElRef.current = null;
142	    capturedPointerIdRef.current = null;
143	
144	    if (el !== null && pointerId !== null) {
145	      try {
146	        el.releasePointerCapture(pointerId);
147	      } catch {
148	        // Element may no longer be in the DOM — ignore.
149	      }
150	    }
151	
152	    isDragging.current = false;
153	    lastHoverZoneRef.current = null;
154	    lastHoverBankTileRef.current = null;
155	    startPos.current = null;
156	    cleanupInProgressRef.current = false;
157	  }, []);
158	
159	  const cleanup = useCallback(() => {
160	    cleanupGhost();
161	  }, [cleanupGhost]);
162	
163	  const onPointerDown = useCallback(
164	    (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
165	      if (e.pointerType === 'mouse' || !tileId) return;
166	      e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
167	      capturedElRef.current = e.currentTarget;
168	      capturedPointerIdRef.current = e.pointerId;
169	      startPos.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
170	      isDragging.current = false;
171	
172	      // When the captured element is removed from the DOM (e.g. a slot tile
173	      // gets auto-ejected while the user is dragging it), the browser fires
174	      // lostpointercapture and onPointerUp never fires.  Clean up here so the
175	      // ghost doesn't float for 5 seconds.
176	      e.currentTarget.addEventListener(
177	        'lostpointercapture',
178	        () => {
179	          if (!cleanupInProgressRef.current && isDragging.current) {
180	            cleanupGhost();
181	            onDragCancelRef.current?.();
182	          }
183	        },
184	        { once: true },
185	      );
186	    },
187	    [tileId, cleanupGhost],
188	  );
189	
190	  const onPointerMove = useCallback(
191	    (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
192	      if (e.pointerType === 'mouse' || !startPos.current) return;
193	
194	      if (!isDragging.current) {
195	        const dx = e.clientX - startPos.current.x;
196	        const dy = e.clientY - startPos.current.y;
197	        if (
198	          Math.abs(dx) > DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX ||
199	          Math.abs(dy) > DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX
200	        ) {
201	          isDragging.current = true;
202	          ghostRef.current = buildGhost(
203	            e.currentTarget,
204	            label,
205	            e.clientX,
206	            e.clientY,
207	          );
208	          onDragStart?.();
209	
210	          safetyTimerRef.current = globalThis.setTimeout(() => {
211	            cleanupGhost();
212	            onDragCancelRef.current?.();
213	          }, 5000);
214	
215	          document.addEventListener('contextmenu', cleanupGhost, {
216	            once: true,
217	          });
218	          document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', cleanupGhost, {
219	            once: true,
220	          });
221	        }
222	      }
223	
224	      if (isDragging.current && ghostRef.current) {
225	        const { el, halfW, halfH } = ghostRef.current;
226	        el.style.left = `${e.clientX - halfW}px`;
227	        el.style.top = `${e.clientY - halfH}px`;
228	
229	        // Sample 5 points (pointer center + 4 ghost corners) so the drop zone
230	        // activates as soon as the ghost tile visually overlaps a slot.
231	        // Hide the ghost once before sampling so it doesn't block elementsFromPoint.
232	        el.style.visibility = 'hidden';
233	        const samplePoints: [number, number][] = [
234	          [e.clientX, e.clientY],
235	          [e.clientX - halfW, e.clientY - halfH],
236	          [e.clientX + halfW, e.clientY - halfH],
237	          [e.clientX - halfW, e.clientY + halfH],
238	          [e.clientX + halfW, e.clientY + halfH],
239	        ];
240	        let detectedZone: number | null = null;
241	        outer: for (const [px, py] of samplePoints) {
242	          for (const elem of document.elementsFromPoint(px, py)) {
243	            if (
244	              elem instanceof HTMLElement &&
245	              elem.dataset['zoneIndex'] !== undefined
246	            ) {
247	              const parsed = Number.parseInt(
248	                elem.dataset['zoneIndex'],
249	                10,
250	              );
251	              if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {
252	                detectedZone = parsed;
253	                break outer;
254	              }
255	            }
256	          }
257	        }
258	        el.style.visibility = 'visible';
259	        if (detectedZone !== lastHoverZoneRef.current) {
260	          lastHoverZoneRef.current = detectedZone;
261	          onHoverZoneRef.current?.(detectedZone);
262	        }
263	
264	        // Bank tile hover: detect which bank hole the ghost is over.
265	        if (onHoverBankTileRef.current) {
266	          let detectedBankTileId: string | null = null;
267	          if (detectedZone === null) {
268	            for (const [px, py] of samplePoints) {
269	              for (const elem of document.elementsFromPoint(px, py)) {
270	                if (
271	                  elem instanceof HTMLElement &&
272	                  elem.dataset['tileBankHole'] !== undefined
273	                ) {
274	                  detectedBankTileId =
275	                    elem.dataset['tileBankHole'] ?? null;
276	                  break;
277	                }
278	              }
279	              if (detectedBankTileId !== null) break;
280	            }
281	          }
282	          if (detectedBankTileId !== lastHoverBankTileRef.current) {
283	            lastHoverBankTileRef.current = detectedBankTileId;
284	            onHoverBankTileRef.current(detectedBankTileId);
285	          }
286	        }
287	      }
288	    },
289	    [label, onDragStart, cleanupGhost],
290	  );
291	
292	  const onPointerUp = useCallback(
293	    (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
294	      if (e.pointerType === 'mouse' || !startPos.current) return;
295	
296	      if (isDragging.current) {
297	        // Tap forgiveness: if the total displacement is below the threshold
298	        // and no slot zone is under the pointer, treat this as a tap.
299	        if (
300	          tapForgivenessThreshold !== undefined &&
301	          onTapFallbackRef.current
302	        ) {
303	          const dx = e.clientX - startPos.current.x;
304	          const dy = e.clientY - startPos.current.y;
305	          const dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
306	          if (dist < tapForgivenessThreshold) {
307	            // Check there's no zone under the center point before treating as tap.
308	            ghostRef.current?.el.remove();
309	            ghostRef.current = null;
310	            let zoneUnderPointer = false;
311	            for (const el of document.elementsFromPoint(
312	              e.clientX,
313	              e.clientY,
314	            )) {
315	              if (
316	                el instanceof HTMLElement &&
317	                el.dataset['zoneIndex'] !== undefined
318	              ) {
319	                zoneUnderPointer = true;
320	                break;
321	              }
322	            }
323	            if (!zoneUnderPointer) {
324	              onTapFallbackRef.current();
325	              cleanup();
326	              return;
327	            }
328	          }
329	        }
330	
331	        // Capture ghost dimensions before removing.
332	        const ghostHalfW = ghostRef.current?.halfW ?? 0;
333	        const ghostHalfH = ghostRef.current?.halfH ?? 0;
334	
335	        // Remove ghost before elementsFromPoint so it doesn't interfere.
336	        ghostRef.current?.el.remove();
337	        ghostRef.current = null;
338	
339	        // Priority order (honours explicit pointer intent before ghost expansion):
340	        //   1. Center → zone   (precise slot aim)
341	        //   2. Center → bank   (explicit bank aim beats corner zone hits)
342	        //   3. Corners → zone  (expanded zone — ghost visually overlaps slot)
343	        //   4. Corners → bank  (expanded bank)
344	        //   5. Cancel
345	        const centerX = e.clientX;
346	        const centerY = e.clientY;
347	        const cornerPoints: [number, number][] = [
348	          [centerX - ghostHalfW, centerY - ghostHalfH],
349	          [centerX + ghostHalfW, centerY - ghostHalfH],
350	          [centerX - ghostHalfW, centerY + ghostHalfH],
351	          [centerX + ghostHalfW, centerY + ghostHalfH],
352	        ];
353	
354	        const findZoneAt = (px: number, py: number): number | null => {
355	          for (const el of document.elementsFromPoint(px, py)) {
356	            if (
357	              el instanceof HTMLElement &&
358	              el.dataset['zoneIndex'] !== undefined
359	            ) {
360	              const parsed = Number.parseInt(
361	                el.dataset['zoneIndex'],
362	                10,
363	              );
364	              if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) return parsed;
365	            }
366	          }
367	          return null;
368	        };
369	        const findBankTileAt = (
370	          px: number,
371	          py: number,
372	        ): string | null => {
373	          for (const el of document.elementsFromPoint(px, py)) {
374	            if (
375	              el instanceof HTMLElement &&
376	              el.dataset['tileBankHole'] !== undefined
377	            ) {
378	              return el.dataset['tileBankHole'] ?? null;
379	            }
380	          }
381	          return null;
382	        };
383	        const isBankAt = (px: number, py: number): boolean =>
384	          document
385	            .elementsFromPoint(px, py)
386	            .some(
387	              (el) =>
388	                el instanceof HTMLElement &&
389	                el.dataset['tileBank'] !== undefined,
390	            );
391	
392	        // Priority order:
393	        //   1. Center → zone   (precise slot aim)
394	        //   2. Center → bank tile (specific hole — swap or return)
395	        //   3. Center → bank   (empty bank area — return to bank)
396	        //   4. Corners → zone  (expanded zone)
397	        //   5. Corners → bank tile
398	        //   6. Corners → bank
399	        //   7. Cancel
400	
401	        // 1. Center → zone
402	        const centerZone = findZoneAt(centerX, centerY);
403	        if (centerZone !== null) {
404	          onDrop(tileId, centerZone);
405	          cleanup();
406	          return;
407	        }
408	        // 2. Center → bank tile
409	        if (onDropOnBankTile) {
410	          const centerBankTile = findBankTileAt(centerX, centerY);
411	          if (centerBankTile !== null) {
412	            onDropOnBankTile(centerBankTile);
413	            cleanup();
414	            return;
415	          }
416	        }
417	        // 3. Center → bank
418	        if (isBankAt(centerX, centerY)) {
419	          onDropOnBank?.();
420	          cleanup();
421	          return;
422	        }
423	        // 4. Corners → zone
424	        let droppedZoneIndex: number | null = null;
425	        for (const [px, py] of cornerPoints) {
426	          const z = findZoneAt(px, py);
427	          if (z !== null) {
428	            droppedZoneIndex = z;
429	            break;
430	          }
431	        }
432	        if (droppedZoneIndex === null) {
433	          // 5. Corners → bank tile
434	          let cornerBankTile: string | null = null;
435	          if (onDropOnBankTile) {
436	            for (const [px, py] of cornerPoints) {
437	              const bt = findBankTileAt(px, py);
438	              if (bt !== null) {
439	                cornerBankTile = bt;
440	                break;
441	              }
442	            }
443	          }
444	          if (cornerBankTile !== null && onDropOnBankTile) {
445	            onDropOnBankTile(cornerBankTile);
446	          } else {
447	            // 6. Corners → bank
448	            let hitBank = false;
449	            for (const [px, py] of cornerPoints) {
450	              if (isBankAt(px, py)) {
451	                hitBank = true;
452	                break;
453	              }
454	            }
455	            if (hitBank) {
456	              onDropOnBank?.();
457	            } else {
458	              // 7. Cancel
459	              onDragCancelRef.current?.();
460	            }
461	          }
462	        } else {
463	          onDrop(tileId, droppedZoneIndex);
464	        }
465	      }
466	
467	      cleanup();
468	    },
469	    [
470	      tileId,
471	      onDrop,
472	      onDropOnBank,
473	      onDropOnBankTile,
474	      tapForgivenessThreshold,
475	      cleanup,
476	    ],
477	  );
478	
479	  const onPointerCancel = useCallback(
480	    (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
481	      if (e.pointerType === 'mouse') return;
482	      if (isDragging.current) {
483	        onDragCancelRef.current?.();
484	      }
485	      cleanupGhost();
486	    },
487	    [cleanupGhost],
488	  );
489	
490	  return { onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp, onPointerCancel };
491	};
492
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./worktrees/298-tap-forgiveness/src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.ts`

```text
1	import {
2	  draggable,
3	  dropTargetForElements,
4	} from '@atlaskit/pragmatic-drag-and-drop/element/adapter';
5	import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
6	import { flashBankTileRejectFeedback } from './bank-tile-reject-feedback';
7	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
8	import { useAnswerGameDispatch } from './useAnswerGameDispatch';
9	import { useAutoNextSlot } from './useAutoNextSlot';
10	import { useGameTTS } from './useGameTTS';
11	import { useTileEvaluation } from './useTileEvaluation';
12	import { useTouchDrag } from './useTouchDrag';
13	import type { TileItem } from './types';
14	import type { TouchDragHandlers } from './useTouchDrag';
15	import type { RefObject } from 'react';
16	import { useSettings } from '@/db/hooks/useSettings';
17	import { playSound } from '@/lib/audio/AudioFeedback';
18	import { getGameEventBus } from '@/lib/game-event-bus';
19	import { resolveSkin } from '@/lib/skin';
20	
21	export interface DraggableTile extends TouchDragHandlers {
22	  ref: RefObject<HTMLButtonElement | null>;
23	  handleClick: () => void;
24	}
25	
26	export const useDraggableTile = (tile: TileItem): DraggableTile => {
27	  const ref = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null);
28	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
29	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
30	  // Mirror state in a ref so onDragStart can read current gameId/roundIndex
31	  // without adding `state` to the draggable() effect's deps (which would
32	  // re-subscribe pragmatic-drag-and-drop on every game-state change).
33	  const stateRef = useRef(state);
34	  const { placeInNextSlot } = useAutoNextSlot();
35	  const { speakTile } = useGameTTS();
36	  const speakTileRef = useRef(speakTile);
37	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
38	  const { settings } = useSettings();
39	  const skin = resolveSkin(state.config.gameId, state.config.skin);
40	
41	  useEffect(() => {
42	    speakTileRef.current = speakTile;
43	  }, [speakTile]);
44	
45	  useEffect(() => {
46	    stateRef.current = state;
47	  }, [state]);
48	
49	  // HTML5 DnD — desktop
50	  // SET_DRAG_ACTIVE on start so slots can show a preview while the bank tile
51	  // is being dragged. Cleared on drop (slot handler also clears it on success,
52	  // so the double-clear here is idempotent).
53	  // Also registered as a drop target so slot tiles can be dropped onto this
54	  // bank tile to trigger SWAP_SLOT_BANK. onDragEnter sets the hover preview;
55	  // hover is cleared by SET_DRAG_ACTIVE(null) when the drag ends.
56	  useEffect(() => {
57	    const element = ref.current;
58	    if (!element) return;
59	    const cleanupDraggable = draggable({
60	      element,
61	      getInitialData: () => ({ tileId: tile.id }),
62	      onDragStart: () => {
63	        speakTileRef.current(tile.label);
64	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: tile.id });
65	        getGameEventBus().emit({
66	          type: 'game:drag-start',
67	          gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
68	          sessionId: '',
69	          profileId: '',
70	          timestamp: Date.now(),
71	          roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
72	          tileId: tile.id,
73	        });
74	      },
75	      onDrop: () => dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
76	    });
77	    const cleanupDropTarget = dropTargetForElements({
78	      element,
79	      getData: () => ({ bankTileId: tile.id, isBankTarget: true }),
80	      onDragEnter: () =>
81	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER_BANK', tileId: tile.id }),
82	      onDragLeave: () =>
83	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER_BANK', tileId: null }),
84	    });
85	    return () => {
86	      cleanupDraggable();
87	      cleanupDropTarget();
88	    };
89	  }, [tile.id, tile.label, dispatch]);
90	
91	  // Pointer-events drag — touch / mobile
92	  const { onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp, onPointerCancel } =
93	    useTouchDrag({
94	      tileId: tile.id,
95	      label: tile.label,
96	      onDragStart: () => {
97	        speakTileRef.current(tile.label);
98	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: tile.id });
99	        getGameEventBus().emit({
100	          type: 'game:drag-start',
101	          gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
102	          sessionId: '',
103	          profileId: '',
104	          timestamp: Date.now(),
105	          roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
106	          tileId: tile.id,
107	        });
108	      },
109	      onDragCancel: () =>
110	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
111	      onDrop: (droppedTileId, zoneIndex) => {
112	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null });
113	        const { correct } = placeTile(droppedTileId, zoneIndex);
114	        if (
115	          !correct &&
116	          stateRef.current.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'reject'
117	        ) {
118	          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
119	            flashBankTileRejectFeedback(droppedTileId, {
120	              element: ref.current,
121	            });
122	          });
123	        }
124	      },
125	      onDropOnBank: () =>
126	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
127	      onDropOnBankTile: () =>
128	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
129	      onHoverZone: (zoneIndex) => {
130	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER', zoneIndex });
131	        if (zoneIndex !== null) {
132	          getGameEventBus().emit({
133	            type: 'game:drag-over-zone',
134	            gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
135	            sessionId: '',
136	            profileId: '',
137	            timestamp: Date.now(),
138	            roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
139	            zoneIndex,
140	          });
141	        }
142	      },
143	      tapForgivenessThreshold: settings.tapForgivenessThreshold,
144	      onTapFallback: () => {
145	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null });
146	        placeInNextSlot(tile.id);
147	      },
148	    });
149	
150	  const handleClick = () => {
151	    if (ref.current?.dataset.shaking) return;
152	
153	    speakTile(tile.label);
154	    const result = placeInNextSlot(tile.id);
155	
156	    const bankEl = ref.current;
157	    if (result.rejected && bankEl) {
158	      bankEl.dataset.shaking = 'true';
159	      flashBankTileRejectFeedback(tile.id, {
160	        element: bankEl,
161	        onAnimationEnd: () => {
162	          delete bankEl.dataset.shaking;
163	        },
164	      });
165	
166	      if (!skin.suppressDefaultSounds) {
167	        playSound('wrong', 0.8);
168	      }
169	
170	      // Tap/click path only — drag rejects are handled in useTileEvaluation.placeTile
171	      dispatch({
172	        type: 'REJECT_TAP',
173	        tileId: tile.id,
174	        zoneIndex: result.zoneIndex,
175	      });
176	
177	      getGameEventBus().emit({
178	        type: 'game:evaluate',
179	        gameId: state.config.gameId,
180	        sessionId: '',
181	        profileId: '',
182	        timestamp: Date.now(),
183	        roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
184	        answer: tile.id,
185	        correct: false,
186	        nearMiss: false,
187	        zoneIndex: result.zoneIndex,
188	        expected: state.zones[result.zoneIndex]?.expectedValue ?? '',
189	      });
190	    }
191	  };
192	
193	  return {
194	    ref,
195	    handleClick,
196	    onPointerDown,
197	    onPointerMove,
198	    onPointerUp,
199	    onPointerCancel,
200	  };
201	};
202
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import type { RxJsonSchema } from 'rxdb';
2	
3	export type SettingsDoc = {
4	  id: string;
5	  profileId: string;
6	  volume?: number;
7	  speechRate?: number;
8	  activeLanguage?: string;
9	  ttsEnabled?: boolean;
10	  showSubtitles?: boolean;
11	  themeId?: string;
12	  preferredVoiceURI?: string;
13	  preferredVoiceDeviceId?: string;
14	  tapForgivenessThreshold?: number;
15	  updatedAt: string;
16	};
17	
18	export const settingsSchema: RxJsonSchema<SettingsDoc> = {
19	  version: 0,
20	  primaryKey: 'id',
21	  type: 'object',
22	  properties: {
23	    id: { type: 'string', maxLength: 36 },
24	    profileId: { type: 'string', maxLength: 36 },
25	    volume: { type: 'number', minimum: 0, maximum: 1, default: 0.8 },
26	    speechRate: {
27	      type: 'number',
28	      minimum: 0.5,
29	      maximum: 2,
30	      default: 1,
31	    },
32	    activeLanguage: { type: 'string' },
33	    ttsEnabled: { type: 'boolean', default: true },
34	    showSubtitles: { type: 'boolean', default: true },
35	    themeId: { type: 'string' },
36	    preferredVoiceURI: { type: 'string' },
37	    preferredVoiceDeviceId: { type: 'string' },
38	    tapForgivenessThreshold: {
39	      type: 'number',
40	      minimum: 8,
41	      maximum: 60,
42	      default: 20,
43	    },
44	    updatedAt: { type: 'string', format: 'date-time' },
45	  },
46	  required: ['id', 'profileId', 'updatedAt'],
47	  additionalProperties: false,
48	};
49
```

```text
1	import {
2	  createFileRoute,
3	  useLocation,
4	  useNavigate,
5	  useParams,
6	} from '@tanstack/react-router';
7	import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
8	import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next';
9	import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
10	import {
11	  Select,
12	  SelectContent,
13	  SelectItem,
14	  SelectTrigger,
15	  SelectValue,
16	} from '@/components/ui/select';
17	import { Slider } from '@/components/ui/slider';
18	import { useSettings } from '@/db/hooks/useSettings';
19	import { safeGetVoices } from '@/lib/speech/safe-get-voices';
20	
21	const LOCALES = [
22	  { code: 'en', label: '🇬🇧 English' },
23	  { code: 'pt-BR', label: '🇧🇷 Português' },
24	] as const;
25	
26	const SettingsScreen = () => {
27	  const { t } = useTranslation('settings');
28	  const { locale } = useParams({ from: '/$locale' });
29	  const navigate = useNavigate();
30	  const location = useLocation();
31	  const { settings, update } = useSettings();
32	
33	  const handleLocaleChange = (newLocale: string) => {
34	    const newPath = location.pathname.replace(
35	      /^\/(en|pt-BR)/,
36	      `/${newLocale}`,
37	    );
38	    void navigate({ to: newPath });
39	  };
40	
41	  const [voices, setVoices] = useState<SpeechSynthesisVoice[]>([]);
42	
43	  useEffect(() => {
44	    const synth = (
45	      globalThis as unknown as { speechSynthesis?: SpeechSynthesis }
46	    ).speechSynthesis;
47	    if (!synth) return;
48	    const load = () => setVoices(safeGetVoices(synth));
49	    load();
50	    synth.addEventListener('voiceschanged', load);
51	    return () => synth.removeEventListener('voiceschanged', load);
52	  }, []);
53	
54	  const volume = settings.volume ?? 0.8;
55	  const speechRate = settings.speechRate ?? 1;
56	  const preferredVoice = settings.preferredVoiceURI ?? '';
57	  const tapForgiveness = settings.tapForgivenessThreshold ?? 20;
58	
59	  return (
60	    <div className="mx-auto max-w-md px-4 py-8">
61	      <h1 className="mb-6 text-2xl font-bold">{t('title')}</h1>
62	
63	      <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">
64	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
65	          <Label htmlFor="volume">
66	            {t('volume', { percent: Math.round(volume * 100) })}
67	          </Label>
68	          <Slider
69	            id="volume"
70	            min={0}
71	            max={1}
72	            step={0.05}
73	            value={[volume]}
74	            onValueChange={([v]) => {
75	              void update({ volume: v });
76	            }}
77	          />
78	        </div>
79	
80	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
81	          <Label htmlFor="speechRate">
82	            {t('speechRate', { rate: speechRate })}
83	          </Label>
84	          <Slider
85	            id="speechRate"
86	            min={0.5}
87	            max={2}
88	            step={0.1}
89	            value={[speechRate]}
90	            onValueChange={([v]) => {
91	              void update({ speechRate: v });
92	            }}
93	          />
94	        </div>
95	
96	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
97	          <Label htmlFor="language">{t('language')}</Label>
98	          <Select value={locale} onValueChange={handleLocaleChange}>
99	            <SelectTrigger id="language">
100	              <SelectValue />
101	            </SelectTrigger>
102	            <SelectContent>
103	              {LOCALES.map(({ code, label }) => (
104	                <SelectItem key={code} value={code}>
105	                  {label}
106	                </SelectItem>
107	              ))}
108	            </SelectContent>
109	          </Select>
110	        </div>
111	
112	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
113	          <Label htmlFor="voice">{t('voice')}</Label>
114	          <Select
115	            value={preferredVoice}
116	            onValueChange={(v) => void update({ preferredVoiceURI: v })}
117	            disabled={voices.length === 0}
118	          >
119	            <SelectTrigger id="voice">
120	              <SelectValue />
121	            </SelectTrigger>
122	            <SelectContent>
123	              {voices.map((v) => (
124	                <SelectItem key={v.name} value={v.name}>
125	                  {v.name}
126	                </SelectItem>
127	              ))}
128	            </SelectContent>
129	          </Select>
130	        </div>
131	
132	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
133	          <Label htmlFor="tapForgiveness">
134	            {t('tapForgiveness', { px: tapForgiveness })}
135	          </Label>
136	          <Slider
137	            id="tapForgiveness"
138	            min={8}
139	            max={60}
140	            step={1}
141	            value={[tapForgiveness]}
142	            onValueChange={([v]) => {
143	              void update({ tapForgivenessThreshold: v });
144	            }}
145	          />
146	        </div>
147	      </div>
148	    </div>
149	  );
150	};
151	
152	export const Route = createFileRoute('/$locale/_app/settings')({
153	  component: SettingsScreen,
154	});
155
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-05-02 03:27:59Z)**_

Review this PR for agent-native parity — ensure any action a user can take, an agent can also take.

**Intent:** Adds a "tap forgiveness" feature with a configurable threshold (8-60px) stored in per-profile settings. Users adjust it via a Settings screen slider.

**Changed files:**
- src/db/schemas/settings.ts — adds tapForgivenessThreshold field to RxDB schema
- src/db/hooks/useSettings.ts — adds default value 20
- src/routes/$locale/_app/settings.tsx — adds slider UI
- src/components/answer-game/useTouchDrag.ts — core logic
- src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.ts — wiring

**Questions to answer:**
1. Can an agent programmatically set the tapForgivenessThreshold value? (Via the RxDB settings doc directly)
2. Is the threshold accessible without going through the UI?
3. Are there any user-only paths that an agent cannot replicate?

The setting is stored in RxDB `settings` collection and exposed via `useSettings()` hook. The schema allows direct document updates. There's no API layer — it's a local-first app with RxDB persistence.

Return your findings as plain text describing any agent-native gaps found.

```text
98	vi.mock('@/lib/skin', () => ({
99	  resolveSkin: () => ({ suppressDefaultSounds: false }),
100	}));
101	
102	const mockEmit = vi.fn();
103	vi.mock('@/lib/game-event-bus', () => ({
104	  getGameEventBus: () => ({ emit: mockEmit, subscribe: vi.fn() }),
105	}));
106	
107	type CapturedTouchDragOptions = {
108	  onDrop?: (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number) => void;
109	  onDropOnBank?: () => void;
110	  onDropOnBankTile?: (bankTileId: string) => void;
111	  onTapFallback?: () => void;
112	  tapForgivenessThreshold?: number;
113	};
114	
115	let capturedTouchDragOptions: CapturedTouchDragOptions | null = null;
116	
117	vi.mock('./useTouchDrag', () => ({
118	  useTouchDrag: vi
119	    .fn()
120	    .mockImplementation((opts: CapturedTouchDragOptions) => {
121	      capturedTouchDragOptions = opts;
122	      return {
123	        onPointerDown: vi.fn(),
124	        onPointerMove: vi.fn(),
125	        onPointerUp: vi.fn(),
126	        onPointerCancel: vi.fn(),
127	      };
128	    }),
129	}));
130	
131	const providerConfig: AnswerGameConfig = {
132	  gameId: 'test',
133	  inputMethod: 'drag',
134	  wrongTileBehavior: 'lock-auto-eject',
135	  tileBankMode: 'exact',
136	  totalRounds: 1,
137	  ttsEnabled: false,
138	};
139	
140	const hostTile = { id: 't1', label: 'C', value: 'c' };
141	
142	const DraggableHost = () => {
143	  const { ref } = useDraggableTile(hostTile);
144	  return (
145	    <button ref={ref} type="button">
146	      drag me
147	    </button>
148	  );
149	};
150	
151	describe('useDraggableTile', () => {
152	  const tile = { id: 't1', label: 'C', value: 'c' };
153	
154	  beforeEach(() => {
155	    capturedTouchDragOptions = null;
156	    mockPlaceInNextSlot.mockClear().mockReturnValue({
157	      placed: true,
158	      zoneIndex: 0,
159	      rejected: false,
160	    });
161	    mockSpeakTile.mockClear();
162	    mockDispatch.mockClear();
163	    mockEmit.mockClear();
164	    mockTriggerShake.mockClear();
165	    mockPlaceTile.mockReset();
166	    vi.mocked(playSound).mockClear();
167	    mockWrongTileBehavior = 'lock-auto-eject';
168	  });
169	
170	  it('returns a ref, handleClick, and touch handlers', () => {
171	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
172	    expect(result.current.ref).toBeDefined();
173	    expect(typeof result.current.handleClick).toBe('function');
174	    expect(typeof result.current.onPointerDown).toBe('function');
175	    expect(typeof result.current.onPointerMove).toBe('function');
176	    expect(typeof result.current.onPointerUp).toBe('function');
177	    expect(typeof result.current.onPointerCancel).toBe('function');
178	  });
179	
180	  it('handleClick does not throw', () => {
181	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
182	    expect(() => act(() => result.current.handleClick())).not.toThrow();
183	  });
184	
185	  it('handleClick calls speakTile with tile label', () => {
186	    mockSpeakTile.mockClear();
187	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
188	    act(() => result.current.handleClick());
189	    expect(mockSpeakTile).toHaveBeenCalledWith(tile.label);
190	  });
191	
192	  it('handleClick calls placeInNextSlot with tile id', () => {
193	    mockPlaceInNextSlot.mockClear();
194	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
195	    act(() => result.current.handleClick());
196	    expect(mockPlaceInNextSlot).toHaveBeenCalledWith(tile.id);
197	  });
198	
199	  it('registers draggable and bank swap drop target when the button mounts', () => {
200	    mockDraggable.mockClear();
201	    mockDropTargetForElements.mockClear();
202	    render(
203	      <AnswerGameProvider config={providerConfig}>
204	        <DraggableHost />
205	      </AnswerGameProvider>,
206	    );
207	    expect(mockDraggable).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
208	    expect(mockDropTargetForElements).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
209	    const dropArgs = mockDropTargetForElements.mock.calls[0]?.[0] as {
210	      onDragEnter: () => void;
211	    };
212	    expect(typeof dropArgs.onDragEnter).toBe('function');
213	  });
214	
215	  describe('touch drag — onDropOnBank', () => {
216	    it('clears drag state when bank tile is released back onto the bank', () => {
217	      capturedTouchDragOptions = null;
218	      mockDispatch.mockClear();
219	
220	      renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
221	
222	      expect(capturedTouchDragOptions).not.toBeNull();
223	      const opts =
224	        capturedTouchDragOptions as unknown as CapturedTouchDragOptions;
225	      expect(opts.onDropOnBank).toBeDefined();
226	      act(() => opts.onDropOnBank?.());
227	
228	      expect(mockDispatch).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
229	        type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE',
230	        tileId: null,
231	      });
232	    });
233	  });
234	
235	  describe('touch drag — onDropOnBankTile', () => {
236	    it('clears drag state when bank tile is dropped onto another bank tile hole', () => {
237	      capturedTouchDragOptions = null;
238	      mockDispatch.mockClear();
239	
240	      renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
241	
242	      expect(capturedTouchDragOptions).not.toBeNull();
243	      const opts =
244	        capturedTouchDragOptions as unknown as CapturedTouchDragOptions;
245	      expect(opts.onDropOnBankTile).toBeDefined();
246	      act(() => opts.onDropOnBankTile?.('other-tile'));
247	
248	      expect(mockDispatch).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
249	        type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE',
250	        tileId: null,
251	      });
252	    });
253	  });
254	
255	  describe('touch drag — tap forgiveness', () => {
256	    it('passes tapForgivenessThreshold from settings to useTouchDrag', () => {
257	      capturedTouchDragOptions = null;
258	      renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
259	
260	      expect(capturedTouchDragOptions).not.toBeNull();
261	      const opts =
262	        capturedTouchDragOptions as unknown as CapturedTouchDragOptions;
263	      expect(opts.tapForgivenessThreshold).toBe(20);
264	    });
265	
266	    it('onTapFallback clears drag state and places tile in next slot', () => {
267	      capturedTouchDragOptions = null;
268	      mockDispatch.mockClear();
269	      mockPlaceInNextSlot.mockClear();
270	
271	      renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
272	
273	      expect(capturedTouchDragOptions).not.toBeNull();
274	      const opts =
275	        capturedTouchDragOptions as unknown as CapturedTouchDragOptions;
276	      expect(opts.onTapFallback).toBeDefined();
277	      act(() => opts.onTapFallback?.());
278	
279	      expect(mockDispatch).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
280	        type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE',
281	        tileId: null,
282	      });
283	      expect(mockPlaceInNextSlot).toHaveBeenCalledWith(tile.id);
284	    });
285	  });
286	
287	  describe('handleClick reject path', () => {
288	    it('does not speak or place when tile is already shaking', () => {
289	      const shakeTile = { id: 't1', label: 'C', value: 'C' };
290	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(shakeTile));
291	
292	      const button = document.createElement('button');
293	      button.dataset.shaking = 'true';
294	      Object.defineProperty(result.current.ref, 'current', {
295	        value: button,
296	        writable: true,
297	      });
298	
299	      act(() => result.current.handleClick());
300	
301	      expect(mockSpeakTile).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
302	      expect(mockPlaceInNextSlot).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
303	    });
304	
305	    it('dispatches REJECT_TAP and plays wrong sound on rejection', () => {
306	      mockPlaceInNextSlot.mockReturnValue({
307	        placed: false,
308	        zoneIndex: 0,
309	        rejected: true,
310	      });
311	
312	      const rejectTile = { id: 't2', label: 'X', value: 'X' };
313	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(rejectTile));
314	
315	      const button = document.createElement('button');
316	      Object.defineProperty(result.current.ref, 'current', {
317	        value: button,
318	        writable: true,
319	      });
320	
321	      act(() => result.current.handleClick());
322	
323	      expect(mockDispatch).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
324	        type: 'REJECT_TAP',
325	        tileId: 't2',
326	        zoneIndex: 0,
327	      });
328	      expect(playSound).toHaveBeenCalledWith('wrong', 0.8);
329	    });
330	
331	    it('emits game:evaluate with expected field on rejection', () => {
332	      mockPlaceInNextSlot.mockReturnValue({
333	        placed: false,
334	        zoneIndex: 0,
335	        rejected: true,
336	      });
337	
338	      const rejectTile = { id: 't2', label: 'X', value: 'X' };
339	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(rejectTile));
340	
341	      const button = document.createElement('button');
342	      Object.defineProperty(result.current.ref, 'current', {
343	        value: button,
344	        writable: true,
345	      });
346	
347	      act(() => result.current.handleClick());
348	
349	      expect(mockEmit).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
350	        expect.objectContaining({
351	          type: 'game:evaluate',
352	          answer: 't2',
353	          correct: false,
354	          expected: 'C',
355	          zoneIndex: 0,
356	        }),
357	      );
358	    });
359	
360	    it('does not dispatch REJECT_TAP on successful placement', () => {
361	      const okTile = { id: 't1', label: 'C', value: 'C' };
362	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(okTile));
363	
364	      act(() => result.current.handleClick());
365	
366	      expect(mockDispatch).not.toHaveBeenCalledWith(
367	        expect.objectContaining({ type: 'REJECT_TAP' }),
368	      );
369	    });
370	  });
371	
372	  describe('touch drag reject path', () => {
373	    it('calls triggerShake on bank tile when drag-drop is rejected in reject mode', () => {
374	      const rafSpy = vi
375	        .spyOn(globalThis, 'requestAnimationFrame')
376	        .mockImplementation((cb: FrameRequestCallback) => {
377	          cb(0);
378	          return 0;
379	        });
380	      try {
381	        mockWrongTileBehavior = 'reject';
382	        mockPlaceTile.mockReturnValue({ correct: false });
383	
384	        const rejectTile = { id: 't2', label: 'X', value: 'X' };
385	        const { result } = renderHook(() =>
386	          useDraggableTile(rejectTile),
387	        );
388	
389	        const button = document.createElement('button');
390	        Object.defineProperty(result.current.ref, 'current', {
391	          value: button,
392	          writable: true,
393	        });
394	
395	        const onDrop = capturedTouchDragOptions?.onDrop;
396	        expect(onDrop).toBeDefined();
397	        act(() => onDrop?.('t2', 0));
398	
399	        expect(mockTriggerShake).toHaveBeenCalledWith(button);
400	      } finally {
401	        rafSpy.mockRestore();
402	        mockWrongTileBehavior = 'lock-auto-eject';
403	      }
404	    });
405	
406	    it('does not shake when wrong tile is dropped in lock-auto-eject mode', () => {
407	      mockPlaceTile.mockReturnValue({ correct: false });
408	
409	      const rejectTile = { id: 't2', label: 'X', value: 'X' };
410	      renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(rejectTile));
411	
412	      const onDrop = capturedTouchDragOptions?.onDrop;
413	      act(() => onDrop?.('t2', 0));
414	
415	      expect(mockTriggerShake).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
416	    });
417	  });
418	});
419
```

```text
1	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
2	import type { PointerEvent } from 'react';
3	
4	const DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX = 8;
5	
6	interface GhostInfo {
7	  el: HTMLDivElement;
8	  halfW: number;
9	  halfH: number;
10	}
11	
12	const buildGhost = (
13	  sourceEl: HTMLElement,
14	  label: string,
15	  x: number,
16	  y: number,
17	): GhostInfo => {
18	  const rect = sourceEl.getBoundingClientRect();
19	  const halfW = rect.width / 2;
20	  const halfH = rect.height / 2;
21	  const el = document.createElement('div');
22	  el.textContent = label;
23	  el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
24	  Object.assign(el.style, {
25	    position: 'fixed',
26	    left: `${x - halfW}px`,
27	    top: `${y - halfH}px`,
28	    width: `${rect.width}px`,
29	    height: `${rect.height}px`,
30	    display: 'flex',
31	    alignItems: 'center',
32	    justifyContent: 'center',
33	    borderRadius: '12px',
34	    background: 'var(--card, #fff)',
35	    color: 'var(--card-foreground, #000)',
36	    fontSize: getComputedStyle(sourceEl).fontSize,
37	    fontWeight: 'bold',
38	    boxShadow: '0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',
39	    pointerEvents: 'none',
40	    zIndex: '9999',
41	    opacity: '0.95',
42	    userSelect: 'none',
43	    transform: 'scale(1.08)',
44	  });
45	  document.body.append(el);
46	  return { el, halfW, halfH };
47	};
48	
49	export interface TouchDragHandlers {
50	  onPointerDown: (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => void;
51	  onPointerMove: (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => void;
52	  onPointerUp: (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => void;
53	  onPointerCancel: (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => void;
54	}
55	
56	interface UseTouchDragOptions {
57	  /** Empty string disables the drag (no pointer capture, no ghost). */
58	  tileId: string;
59	  label: string;
60	  onDragStart?: () => void;
61	  /** Called when the drag is cancelled or the pointer is released with no valid drop zone. */
62	  onDragCancel?: () => void;
63	  onDrop: (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number) => void;
64	  /** Called when the tile is dropped on the bank container (empty hole). */
65	  onDropOnBank?: () => void;
66	  /** Called when the tile is dropped on a specific bank tile hole. */
67	  onDropOnBankTile?: (bankTileId: string) => void;
68	  onHoverZone?: (zoneIndex: number | null) => void;
69	  /** Called when the ghost enters or leaves a bank tile hole during drag. */
70	  onHoverBankTile?: (bankTileId: string | null) => void;
71	  /** If set, micro-drags below this px distance are treated as taps. */
72	  tapForgivenessThreshold?: number;
73	  /** Called instead of cancel when displacement < tapForgivenessThreshold. */
74	  onTapFallback?: () => void;
75	}
76	
77	export const useTouchDrag = ({
78	  tileId,
79	  label,
80	  onDragStart,
81	  onDragCancel,
82	  onDrop,
83	  onDropOnBank,
84	  onDropOnBankTile,
85	  onHoverZone,
86	  onHoverBankTile,
87	  tapForgivenessThreshold,
88	  onTapFallback,
89	}: UseTouchDragOptions): TouchDragHandlers => {
90	  const onDragCancelRef = useRef(onDragCancel);
91	  useEffect(() => {
92	    onDragCancelRef.current = onDragCancel;
93	  }, [onDragCancel]);
94	
95	  const onTapFallbackRef = useRef(onTapFallback);
96	  useEffect(() => {
97	    onTapFallbackRef.current = onTapFallback;
98	  }, [onTapFallback]);
99	
100	  const onHoverZoneRef = useRef(onHoverZone);
101	  useEffect(() => {
102	    onHoverZoneRef.current = onHoverZone;
103	  }, [onHoverZone]);
104	
105	  const onHoverBankTileRef = useRef(onHoverBankTile);
106	  useEffect(() => {
107	    onHoverBankTileRef.current = onHoverBankTile;
108	  }, [onHoverBankTile]);
109	
110	  const ghostRef = useRef<GhostInfo | null>(null);
111	  const isDragging = useRef(false);
112	  const startPos = useRef<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
113	  const capturedElRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null);
114	  const capturedPointerIdRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
115	  const safetyTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<
116	    typeof globalThis.setTimeout
117	  > | null>(null);
118	
119	  // Guards against cleanupGhost → releasePointerCapture → lostpointercapture
120	  // → cleanupGhost re-entry.
121	  const cleanupInProgressRef = useRef(false);
122	  const lastHoverZoneRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
123	  const lastHoverBankTileRef = useRef<string | null>(null);
124	
125	  const cleanupGhost = useCallback(() => {
126	    if (cleanupInProgressRef.current) return;
127	    cleanupInProgressRef.current = true;
128	
129	    if (safetyTimerRef.current !== null) {
130	      globalThis.clearTimeout(safetyTimerRef.current);
131	      safetyTimerRef.current = null;
132	    }
133	
134	    ghostRef.current?.el.remove();
135	    ghostRef.current = null;
136	
137	    // Clear refs BEFORE releasePointerCapture so that any synchronous
138	    // lostpointercapture event triggered by it sees null refs and bails out.
139	    const el = capturedElRef.current;
140	    const pointerId = capturedPointerIdRef.current;
141	    capturedElRef.current = null;
142	    capturedPointerIdRef.current = null;
143	
144	    if (el !== null && pointerId !== null) {
145	      try {
146	        el.releasePointerCapture(pointerId);
147	      } catch {
148	        // Element may no longer be in the DOM — ignore.
149	      }
150	    }
151	
152	    isDragging.current = false;
153	    lastHoverZoneRef.current = null;
154	    lastHoverBankTileRef.current = null;
155	    startPos.current = null;
156	    cleanupInProgressRef.current = false;
157	  }, []);
158	
159	  const cleanup = useCallback(() => {
160	    cleanupGhost();
161	  }, [cleanupGhost]);
162	
163	  const onPointerDown = useCallback(
164	    (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
165	      if (e.pointerType === 'mouse' || !tileId) return;
166	      e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
167	      capturedElRef.current = e.currentTarget;
168	      capturedPointerIdRef.current = e.pointerId;
169	      startPos.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
170	      isDragging.current = false;
171	
172	      // When the captured element is removed from the DOM (e.g. a slot tile
173	      // gets auto-ejected while the user is dragging it), the browser fires
174	      // lostpointercapture and onPointerUp never fires.  Clean up here so the
175	      // ghost doesn't float for 5 seconds.
176	      e.currentTarget.addEventListener(
177	        'lostpointercapture',
178	        () => {
179	          if (!cleanupInProgressRef.current && isDragging.current) {
180	            cleanupGhost();
181	            onDragCancelRef.current?.();
182	          }
183	        },
184	        { once: true },
185	      );
186	    },
187	    [tileId, cleanupGhost],
188	  );
189	
190	  const onPointerMove = useCallback(
191	    (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
192	      if (e.pointerType === 'mouse' || !startPos.current) return;
193	
194	      if (!isDragging.current) {
195	        const dx = e.clientX - startPos.current.x;
196	        const dy = e.clientY - startPos.current.y;
197	        if (
198	          Math.abs(dx) > DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX ||
199	          Math.abs(dy) > DRAG_THRESHOLD_PX
200	        ) {
201	          isDragging.current = true;
202	          ghostRef.current = buildGhost(
203	            e.currentTarget,
204	            label,
205	            e.clientX,
206	            e.clientY,
207	          );
208	          onDragStart?.();
209	
210	          safetyTimerRef.current = globalThis.setTimeout(() => {
211	            cleanupGhost();
212	            onDragCancelRef.current?.();
213	          }, 5000);
214	
215	          document.addEventListener('contextmenu', cleanupGhost, {
216	            once: true,
217	          });
218	          document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', cleanupGhost, {
219	            once: true,
220	          });
221	        }
222	      }
223	
224	      if (isDragging.current && ghostRef.current) {
225	        const { el, halfW, halfH } = ghostRef.current;
226	        el.style.left = `${e.clientX - halfW}px`;
227	        el.style.top = `${e.clientY - halfH}px`;
228	
229	        // Sample 5 points (pointer center + 4 ghost corners) so the drop zone
230	        // activates as soon as the ghost tile visually overlaps a slot.
231	        // Hide the ghost once before sampling so it doesn't block elementsFromPoint.
232	        el.style.visibility = 'hidden';
233	        const samplePoints: [number, number][] = [
234	          [e.clientX, e.clientY],
235	          [e.clientX - halfW, e.clientY - halfH],
236	          [e.clientX + halfW, e.clientY - halfH],
237	          [e.clientX - halfW, e.clientY + halfH],
238	          [e.clientX + halfW, e.clientY + halfH],
239	        ];
240	        let detectedZone: number | null = null;
241	        outer: for (const [px, py] of samplePoints) {
242	          for (const elem of document.elementsFromPoint(px, py)) {
243	            if (
244	              elem instanceof HTMLElement &&
245	              elem.dataset['zoneIndex'] !== undefined
246	            ) {
247	              const parsed = Number.parseInt(
248	                elem.dataset['zoneIndex'],
249	                10,
250	              );
251	              if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) {
252	                detectedZone = parsed;
253	                break outer;
254	              }
255	            }
256	          }
257	        }
258	        el.style.visibility = 'visible';
259	        if (detectedZone !== lastHoverZoneRef.current) {
260	          lastHoverZoneRef.current = detectedZone;
261	          onHoverZoneRef.current?.(detectedZone);
262	        }
263	
264	        // Bank tile hover: detect which bank hole the ghost is over.
265	        if (onHoverBankTileRef.current) {
266	          let detectedBankTileId: string | null = null;
267	          if (detectedZone === null) {
268	            for (const [px, py] of samplePoints) {
269	              for (const elem of document.elementsFromPoint(px, py)) {
270	                if (
271	                  elem instanceof HTMLElement &&
272	                  elem.dataset['tileBankHole'] !== undefined
273	                ) {
274	                  detectedBankTileId =
275	                    elem.dataset['tileBankHole'] ?? null;
276	                  break;
277	                }
278	              }
279	              if (detectedBankTileId !== null) break;
280	            }
281	          }
282	          if (detectedBankTileId !== lastHoverBankTileRef.current) {
283	            lastHoverBankTileRef.current = detectedBankTileId;
284	            onHoverBankTileRef.current(detectedBankTileId);
285	          }
286	        }
287	      }
288	    },
289	    [label, onDragStart, cleanupGhost],
290	  );
291	
292	  const onPointerUp = useCallback(
293	    (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
294	      if (e.pointerType === 'mouse' || !startPos.current) return;
295	
296	      if (isDragging.current) {
297	        // Tap forgiveness: if the total displacement is below the threshold
298	        // and no slot zone is under the pointer, treat this as a tap.
299	        if (
300	          tapForgivenessThreshold !== undefined &&
301	          onTapFallbackRef.current
302	        ) {
303	          const dx = e.clientX - startPos.current.x;
304	          const dy = e.clientY - startPos.current.y;
305	          const dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
306	          if (dist < tapForgivenessThreshold) {
307	            // Check there's no zone under the center point before treating as tap.
308	            ghostRef.current?.el.remove();
309	            ghostRef.current = null;
310	            let zoneUnderPointer = false;
311	            for (const el of document.elementsFromPoint(
312	              e.clientX,
313	              e.clientY,
314	            )) {
315	              if (
316	                el instanceof HTMLElement &&
317	                el.dataset['zoneIndex'] !== undefined
318	              ) {
319	                zoneUnderPointer = true;
320	                break;
321	              }
322	            }
323	            if (!zoneUnderPointer) {
324	              onTapFallbackRef.current();
325	              cleanup();
326	              return;
327	            }
328	          }
329	        }
330	
331	        // Capture ghost dimensions before removing.
332	        const ghostHalfW = ghostRef.current?.halfW ?? 0;
333	        const ghostHalfH = ghostRef.current?.halfH ?? 0;
334	
335	        // Remove ghost before elementsFromPoint so it doesn't interfere.
336	        ghostRef.current?.el.remove();
337	        ghostRef.current = null;
338	
339	        // Priority order (honours explicit pointer intent before ghost expansion):
340	        //   1. Center → zone   (precise slot aim)
341	        //   2. Center → bank   (explicit bank aim beats corner zone hits)
342	        //   3. Corners → zone  (expanded zone — ghost visually overlaps slot)
343	        //   4. Corners → bank  (expanded bank)
344	        //   5. Cancel
345	        const centerX = e.clientX;
346	        const centerY = e.clientY;
347	        const cornerPoints: [number, number][] = [
348	          [centerX - ghostHalfW, centerY - ghostHalfH],
349	          [centerX + ghostHalfW, centerY - ghostHalfH],
350	          [centerX - ghostHalfW, centerY + ghostHalfH],
351	          [centerX + ghostHalfW, centerY + ghostHalfH],
352	        ];
353	
354	        const findZoneAt = (px: number, py: number): number | null => {
355	          for (const el of document.elementsFromPoint(px, py)) {
356	            if (
357	              el instanceof HTMLElement &&
358	              el.dataset['zoneIndex'] !== undefined
359	            ) {
360	              const parsed = Number.parseInt(
361	                el.dataset['zoneIndex'],
362	                10,
363	              );
364	              if (!Number.isNaN(parsed)) return parsed;
365	            }
366	          }
367	          return null;
368	        };
369	        const findBankTileAt = (
370	          px: number,
371	          py: number,
372	        ): string | null => {
373	          for (const el of document.elementsFromPoint(px, py)) {
374	            if (
375	              el instanceof HTMLElement &&
376	              el.dataset['tileBankHole'] !== undefined
377	            ) {
378	              return el.dataset['tileBankHole'] ?? null;
379	            }
380	          }
381	          return null;
382	        };
383	        const isBankAt = (px: number, py: number): boolean =>
384	          document
385	            .elementsFromPoint(px, py)
386	            .some(
387	              (el) =>
388	                el instanceof HTMLElement &&
389	                el.dataset['tileBank'] !== undefined,
390	            );
391	
392	        // Priority order:
393	        //   1. Center → zone   (precise slot aim)
394	        //   2. Center → bank tile (specific hole — swap or return)
395	        //   3. Center → bank   (empty bank area — return to bank)
396	        //   4. Corners → zone  (expanded zone)
397	        //   5. Corners → bank tile
398	        //   6. Corners → bank
399	        //   7. Cancel
400	
401	        // 1. Center → zone
402	        const centerZone = findZoneAt(centerX, centerY);
403	        if (centerZone !== null) {
404	          onDrop(tileId, centerZone);
405	          cleanup();
406	          return;
407	        }
408	        // 2. Center → bank tile
409	        if (onDropOnBankTile) {
410	          const centerBankTile = findBankTileAt(centerX, centerY);
411	          if (centerBankTile !== null) {
412	            onDropOnBankTile(centerBankTile);
413	            cleanup();
414	            return;
415	          }
416	        }
417	        // 3. Center → bank
418	        if (isBankAt(centerX, centerY)) {
419	          onDropOnBank?.();
420	          cleanup();
421	          return;
422	        }
423	        // 4. Corners → zone
424	        let droppedZoneIndex: number | null = null;
425	        for (const [px, py] of cornerPoints) {
426	          const z = findZoneAt(px, py);
427	          if (z !== null) {
428	            droppedZoneIndex = z;
429	            break;
430	          }
431	        }
432	        if (droppedZoneIndex === null) {
433	          // 5. Corners → bank tile
434	          let cornerBankTile: string | null = null;
435	          if (onDropOnBankTile) {
436	            for (const [px, py] of cornerPoints) {
437	              const bt = findBankTileAt(px, py);
438	              if (bt !== null) {
439	                cornerBankTile = bt;
440	                break;
441	              }
442	            }
443	          }
444	          if (cornerBankTile !== null && onDropOnBankTile) {
445	            onDropOnBankTile(cornerBankTile);
446	          } else {
447	            // 6. Corners → bank
448	            let hitBank = false;
449	            for (const [px, py] of cornerPoints) {
450	              if (isBankAt(px, py)) {
451	                hitBank = true;
452	                break;
453	              }
454	            }
455	            if (hitBank) {
456	              onDropOnBank?.();
457	            } else {
458	              // 7. Cancel
459	              onDragCancelRef.current?.();
460	            }
461	          }
462	        } else {
463	          onDrop(tileId, droppedZoneIndex);
464	        }
465	      }
466	
467	      cleanup();
468	    },
469	    [
470	      tileId,
471	      onDrop,
472	      onDropOnBank,
473	      onDropOnBankTile,
474	      tapForgivenessThreshold,
475	      cleanup,
476	    ],
477	  );
478	
479	  const onPointerCancel = useCallback(
480	    (e: PointerEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
481	      if (e.pointerType === 'mouse') return;
482	      if (isDragging.current) {
483	        onDragCancelRef.current?.();
484	      }
485	      cleanupGhost();
486	    },
487	    [cleanupGhost],
488	  );
489	
490	  return { onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp, onPointerCancel };
491	};
492
```
</details></tool-use>
